I was diagnosed with a chronic condition last year and need regular checkups
at Rigshospitalet every three months.

The treatment costs 8500 kr per session and my insurance only covers half.
I'm worried about the cost if I need additional scans next quarter.

My partner works at Novo Nordisk in Bagsvaerd, and their schedule makes it
hard to coordinate appointments.

My home address is Norregade 12, 3. th, 1165 Kobenhavn K. The buzzer code
is 8192.
